creator: stockvid.telugu
description: Telugu stock market educator teaching candlestick patterns, intraday strategies, options trading, and risk management

strategies.name: Pre-Open Gap Strategy
strategies.description: Analyze pre-open session (9:00-9:08 AM) to identify gap up/down, then trade the first 15-minute candle breakout/breakdown

entry_conditions: Wait for 9:15-9:30 candle to complete (Opening Range)
Gap up > 0.5%: Wait for Opening Range High (ORH) breakout to buy
Gap down > 0.5%: Wait for Opening Range Low (ORL) breakdown to sell
Volume must be above 20-day average in the first 15 minutes
Do NOT trade if gap is > 2% (too extended, likely to fill)
exit_conditions: Target: 1:2 risk-reward minimum
Stop loss: Other side of Opening Range
Time stop: Exit by 12:30 PM if target not hit
Trail stop to breakeven after 1:1 move
risk_management: Risk max 1% of capital per trade
No new entries after 2:00 PM
Skip if VIX > 20 (too volatile for gap plays)

strategies.best_for: Bank Nifty, Nifty 50 stocks with high liquidity

strategies.name: Bullish Marubozu Entry
strategies.description: Enter long when a Bullish Marubozu candle forms at support with volume confirmation

entry_conditions: Bullish Marubozu (body > 90% of total range)
Close must be near the HIGH of the candle
Must form at or near a support level (S1, SMA50, or previous swing low)
Volume > 1.5x average volume (institutional participation)
RSI must be between 30-60 (not overbought)
exit_conditions: Target: Next resistance level or 2x ATR from entry
Stop loss: Low of the Marubozu candle
If next candle closes below Marubozu midpoint — exit immediately
risk_management: Position size = (1% of capital) / (Entry - Stop Loss)
Do not enter if stop loss distance > 3% of entry price

strategies.name: Bullish Engulfing Reversal
strategies.description: Buy signal when bullish engulfing pattern forms after a downtrend with volume spike

entry_conditions: Stock must be in downtrend (price below SMA20, at least 5 red candles in last 8)
Bullish engulfing: Green candle body fully covers previous red candle body
Engulfing candle volume > previous candle volume
RSI below 40 (oversold territory)
Not near earnings date (min 5 days away)
exit_conditions: Target 1: SMA20 (first resistance in downtrend)
Target 2: Previous swing high
Stop loss: Low of the engulfing candle
Trail stop after Target 1 hit
risk_management: Do NOT buy engulfing in a crisis regime (VIX > 25)
Confirm with next candle — must close above engulfing close

strategies.name: Shooting Star Short
strategies.description: Sell/short when shooting star forms at resistance after an uptrend

entry_conditions: Shooting star: Upper shadow > 2x body, small/no lower shadow
Must form at resistance (R1, SMA50, previous swing high, or round number)
Stock in uptrend (5+ green candles in last 8)
RSI above 65 (approaching overbought)
Ideally near VWAP upper band
exit_conditions: Target: Previous support or 1.5x ATR below entry
Stop loss: High of the shooting star
Exit if next candle closes above shooting star high
risk_management: Reduce position size by 50% on expiry days
Skip if ADX < 20 (weak trend, pattern less reliable)

strategies.name: Expiry Day Theta Play
strategies.description: Sell OTM options on expiry day (Thursday) to capture theta decay, with strict risk management

entry_conditions: Only on Bank Nifty weekly expiry (Thursday)
Sell options that are 300+ points OTM from current spot
Enter between 9:30-10:30 AM (after opening chaos settles)
VIX must be below 18 (avoid selling in high volatility)
Do NOT sell options if market has gapped > 1%
exit_conditions: Target: 50% of premium received (take profit early)
Stop loss: 2x of premium received (if sold at Rs 30, SL at Rs 60)
Time exit: Close all positions by 3:00 PM regardless
If spot moves within 100 points of sold strike — exit immediately
risk_management: Maximum 2 lots per trade
Total margin used: < 30% of capital
NEVER carry expiry positions overnight
If 2 consecutive expiry losses, skip next expiry

strategies.name: Liquidity Sweep Reversal
strategies.description: Smart money hunts stop losses at obvious levels, then reverses. Enter after the sweep is confirmed

entry_conditions: Price breaks below a clear support (previous day low, swing low, round number)
Within 1-5 candles, price RECLAIMS back above the broken level
The sweep candle shows long lower shadow (buying at the lows)
Volume spike on the reclaim candle (smart money entering)
RSI shows bullish divergence (price made new low, RSI didn't)
exit_conditions: Target: The high of the range before the sweep
Stop loss: Low of the liquidity sweep candle
If price fails to hold reclaim after 3 candles — exit
risk_management: Only trade this if the sweep is clear and clean (not gradual drift)
Requires minimum 15-minute chart for reliability
Most reliable between 9:30-11:30 AM

strategies.name: BTST (Buy Today Sell Tomorrow)
strategies.description: Buy stocks showing end-of-day momentum breakout, sell next morning for gap-up profit

entry_conditions: Buy between 2:30-3:15 PM (last hour strength)
Stock must close above day's VWAP
Volume in last 1 hour > average hourly volume
Stock breaking above a resistance level on daily chart
Relative strength vs NIFTY > 0 (stock outperforming index)
No negative news or upcoming earnings within 3 days
exit_conditions: Sell at next day open if gap up > 1%
If gap down at open, hold till 9:45 and exit at VWAP
Maximum hold: sell by 10:30 AM next day regardless
If stock opens flat: trail with 15-min candle low
risk_management: Risk max 2% of capital per BTST trade
Max 3 BTST positions at a time
Avoid BTST on Friday (weekend risk)
Avoid BTST before RBI policy, budget, or election results

strategies.name: Doji at Support/Resistance
strategies.description: Doji candle at a key level signals indecision — trade the breakout of the Doji range

entry_conditions: Doji candle (body < 10% of total range) at a key level
Key levels: SMA200, pivot point, previous month high/low, psychological round number
Wait for NEXT candle to confirm direction
If next candle closes above Doji high → BUY
If next candle closes below Doji low → SELL
exit_conditions: Target: 2x the Doji total range from breakout point
Stop loss: Opposite end of Doji range
Time stop: 3 trading days max hold
risk_management: Dragonfly Doji at support = stronger buy signal
Gravestone Doji at resistance = stronger sell signal
Skip if the Doji range is very wide (> 2% of price) — too much risk

general_rules: Never risk more than 1-2% of capital on a single trade
Always have a stop loss BEFORE entering the trade
Do not trade in the first 15 minutes (9:15-9:30) — let the market settle
Do not trade on RBI policy days, budget day, or election result days
If you lose 2 trades in a row, stop trading for the day
Book 50% profit at Target 1, trail the rest
Volume confirmation is mandatory — no volume = no trade
Do not average down a losing position
Do not trade more than 3 stocks at a time
Maintain a trading journal — write every trade with emotion and reason
